next_head_excerpt:
# Chapter 2

The Mark woke him at four again.

Not the old way — not the burn that had pulled like a fishhook behind his navel, the Dark Lord's summons dragging every branded body toward whatever room he'd chosen for that night's audience. That signal had died with the man who cast it. What remained was different: a slow, arrhythmic ache that started in the bones of his forearm and radiated nowhere. It was pain without direction — magic trying to move through a channel that no longer existed, pressing against dead ends in his nervous system until it gave up and pooled, hot and restless, beneath the ink.

Draco lay in the dark and waited for it to pass. His bedroom was too large for one person — his parents' old suite, which he'd moved into three years ago not because he wanted it but because the alternative was the room he'd slept in at sixteen, and that room still smelled faintly of the boy who'd knelt on its floor and dry-heaved after taking the Mark. He'd tried airing it out. He'd tried redecorating. Eventually he'd simply shut the door and left it shut and taken the master suite with its absurd four-poster bed and its windows that looked out onto the east lawns where no one walked.

The ache subsided around five. He got up because there was no reason not to.

The kitchen was at the far end of the ground floor — the servants' kitchen, not the formal one. He'd stopped using the formal kitchen two years ago because it was built for a household staff that no longer existed, and cooking a single egg in it felt like performing a monologue in an empty theatre. The servants' ki...
open_hooks_to_carry: Establish dying magic through specific daily failures, not exposition
Show Hermione's competence-as-armor: divorced, alone, work as identity
The Mudblood scar glimpsed once — sleeve adjustment, glamour — establishing concealment as habit
The Malfoy library proposition arrives and she decides to go
secondary_character_beats: Harry present through brief contact — a fire-call or note — warm but she deflects his concern

setups_to_plant.description: Hermione adjusts her sleeve or checks a glamour — habitual, automatic, establishing the scar as something she hides from everyone
Specific spell failures and institutional strain that establish the scale of the crisis

state_deltas_required: Magic is dying and every conventional avenue is exhausted; the only remaining lead requires entering the site of her worst trauma
Hermione moves from contained researcher to someone who must enter the Manor — the decision costs her control and sleep
